summary: I was born on March 11, 1931, at St. Mary's Hospital in Reno, Nevada. Although I don't remember the details of my birth, this hospital is where my life began. Reno has always been an important place for me, starting with that very first moment at St. Mary's.

Reno, Nevada, is where I was born and where much of my family's story unfolds. My parents met while attending the University of Nevada in Reno, and after their marriage, they lived nearby in Sparks. Reno has always been central to my family's history and my early life.

My father was originally born in Oregon, but when he was about thirteen or fourteen, he moved away with his mother and her second husband to Tonopah, Nevada. Although he didn't stay in Oregon long, it was his birthplace and the starting point before his life took him to Nevada.

Tonopah, Nevada, is where my father spent his teenage years after moving there with his mother and stepfather. He attended high school in Tonopah and was an outstanding athlete during that time. This town was an important chapter in his youth before he went on to the University of Nevada.

Both my parents attended the University of Nevada, Reno, where they actually met. My father was a standout athlete and even became student body president there. My mother also went to the university, and it was the place where their paths crossed and their future together began.

My father coached at Sparks High School and later became the principal there. He was deeply involved in the school community, and my mother helped him by keeping detailed charts during basketball games. Sparks High School was a significant part of their professional and personal lives.

Eventually, my father became the Superintendent of Schools for Washoe County, Nevada. This was the culmination of his career in education, following his roles in Sparks. Washoe County represents the broader community where he made a lasting impact on education.

My mother was born in Kansas but moved to Ely, Nevada, when she was about two years old. Although she was born in Kansas, her formative years and education took place in Nevada. Kansas is part of her early background before settling in Nevada.

Ely, Nevada, is where my mother grew up after moving there as a toddler from Kansas. She attended high school in Ely before going on to the University of Nevada, where she met my father. Ely was an important place in her early life and education.
